attractions.name: Lake Sandoval
attractions.description: Mirror-like oxbow lake home to giant river otters, howler monkeys, red-bellied macaws, turtles and black caimans
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Canopy Walkway
attractions.description: Platforms 29 meters above ground for exploring jungle from treetops
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Anaconda Walk
attractions.description: 30-minute wooden bridge over 'aguajales' swamps for viewing amphibians, birds, and mammals
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf
